prompt: Using the CodeGrapher MCP server, produce a Mermaid flowchart LR data-flow diagram for the Consumer sub-system of the stress-test codebase. Entry point: consumer/main.cc. Include the full 6-hop chain (on_msg_received through dispatch_event), proto/WSDL decoder branches, LegacyEvent maps_to bridge, and key consumed types (Envelope, MessageBody). Use only MCP tools. Save diagram to outputs/skill_output.md and tool call log to outputs/tool_calls.json.
assertions: Diagram contains at least one decoder node (decode_proto or decode_wsdl or decode_message)
Diagram contains maps_to bridge or LegacyEvent
Tool call log exists and is non-empty
